title: seriphidium tianschanicum
intro: Seriphidium tianschanicum, also known as Tanacetum tianschanicum, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Seriphidium tianschanicum include its ability to relieve headaches, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine in Central Asia to treat various ailments.
